zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Montague於大約1269年出生在英國薩默塞特可希頓時，她的父親Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu21歲，母親Hawise St Amand18歲。她與Sir Robert de Brent在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1344年在她的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Montague于大约1269年出生在英国薩默塞特可希頓时，她的父亲Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu21岁，母亲Hawise St Amand18岁。她与Sir Robert de Brent在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1344年在她的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: McTigue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Taidhg, ‘son of Tadhg’, a personal name originally meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’. Compare McCaig .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Montague was born about 1269, in Cossington, Somerset, England, her father, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, was 21 and her mother, Hawise St Amand, was 18. She married Sir Robert de Brent in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1344, in her hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Montague est née environ 1269, à Cossington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Hawise St Amand, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Brent à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1344, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Montague um 1269 in Cossington, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu 21 und ihre Mutter Hawise St Amand 18. Sie hat in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Sir Robert de Brent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1344 im Alter von 76 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Montague è nata il circa 1269 nel Cossington, Somerset, England, sua padre, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Hawise St Amand, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Brent nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1344, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.Cossington, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトコシントン
ja.Burton, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトブルトン
ja.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー
ja.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグー
ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Montagueが約1269年にイギリスソメルセトコシントンで生まれた時，父Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montaguは21歳，母Hawise St Amandは18歳であった。イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでSir Robert de Brentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1344年に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Montague(이)가 대략 1269년 영국 서머세트 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise St Amand(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Sir Robert de Brent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 그녀의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: Shepton Montague, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Montague nasceu aproximadamente 1269, em Cossington, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Hawise St Amand, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Brent em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1344, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Montague родилась около 1269 г. в местности коссингтон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise St Amand, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Brent в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1344 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Montague nació aproximadamente 1269, en Cossington, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Hawise St Amand, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Brent en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1344, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
